sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Then choose SIX answers from the list and write correct letter A-H next to questions 25-30.

questions.content: How old are the students of the nursing program?
options: B they are in their twenties
C they belong to different age groups

questions.content: What do the speakers say about the group project?
options: A it helps to improve relationship among different classmates
B it helps to develop problem solving skills
C it provides supportive learning environment

questions.content: Which part of the program surprised Paul?
options: A there is a number of essay to write
B there is a lot of practical work

questions.content: What do they feel about learning law?
options: C it takes up too much time

questions.content: What are the suggestions offered by the speakers?
options: A get feedback from teaching staff
C get help from school supporting staff
D get help for nursing problems
H do not set unrealistic goals
